short.en: Edge-mounted clip that keeps charger and headphone cables from sliding off the desk.
short.sl: Zaponka na rob mize, ki prepreči, da bi kabli polnilca in slušalk zdrsnili z mize.

description.en: Living-hinge style clip that snaps onto desks 18–35 mm thick. Internal channel holds three cables; cap clicks shut. Printed flat in PETG, prints in 18 minutes.
description.sl: Zaponka z elastičnim zglobom, ki se zaskoči na mize debeline 18–35 mm. Notranji kanal drži tri kable; pokrovček se zatakne. Tiska se ploščato iz PETG-a, čas tiska 18 minut.
